stock.alt: 工程團隊於實驗環境協作討論
stock.label: Connector Image Stock Asset
stock.notes: Canonical stock placeholder for the footer connector breakout image role.

candidates.label: Nano Connector Image Candidate
candidates.prompt:
{
  "asset_type": "homepage footer connector breakout image",
  "business_context": "Rally Technology, a Taiwanese industrial automation and engineering delivery company",
  "page_role": "Homepage footer connector image",
  "goal": "Create a photorealistic people-forward engineering image that supports a premium connector band and feels more refined and technical than generic teamwork stock",
  "visual_message": "A real engineering collaboration moment with breakout potential, contemporary industrial context, and controlled warmth",
  "recipe_ids": [
    "technical-signal-stack",
    "named-visual-standard",
    "color-material-control",
    "spatial-director-language"
  ],
  "reference_usage": {
    "image_1": "preserve the people-forward breakout rhythm and connector-friendly crop",
    "image_2": "optional technical environment reference"
  },
  "technical_signals": {
    "lens": "50mm commercial collaboration photography",
    "aperture": "f/3.5",
    "light_source": "soft daylight or controlled lab light",
    "time_of_day": "neutral daytime",
    "motion_rule": "light collaborative action, no exaggerated gesturing"
  },
  "spatial_positioning": [
    "one or two subjects can occupy the left half strongly for breakout treatment",
    "background technical environment stays bright, clean, and secondary",
    "crop must remain usable in a short connector band",
    "human interaction should feel real, not staged sales photography"
  ],
  "visual_standard": "premium commercial engineering collaboration photography",
  "color_restriction": "restrained whites, soft neutrals, muted technical metals, and controlled skin tones only",
  "material_notes": [
    "real lab or engineering workstation materials",
    "credible devices or tools",
    "clean fabric textures",
    "no plastic beauty sheen"
  ],
  "scene": "A real engineering or technical collaboration setting with believable tools or equipment and a clean modern atmosphere",
  "subject": "Human collaboration is the hero, but it must remain anchored in technical context and suitable for later breakout treatment",
  "reality_anchors": [
    "credible engineering collaboration",
    "real technical environment",
    "clean subject-background separation",
    "commercially usable breakout crop"
  ],
  "composition": {
    "format": "4:5",
    "hero_safe_area": "not required",
    "focal_structure": "one collaboration focal point with minimal background noise",
    "camera": "commercial collaboration photography",
    "cropping": "designed for a website connector section with breakout treatment"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "style": "premium commercial collaboration photography",
    "mood": "confident, aligned, modern, approachable",
    "contrast": "controlled and clean",
    "surface_behavior": "real skin, fabric, and equipment materials"
  },
  "commercial_constraints": [
    "must feel suitable for a refined B2B industrial website",
    "must be photorealistic",
    "must support later breakout or cutout treatment",
    "must avoid generic office teamwork stock",
    "must not contain text or UI"
  ],
  "avoid": [
    "startup office cliché",
    "sales-team energy",
    "dramatic fashion posing",
    "headline text",
    "fake interface overlays",
    "obvious AI artifacts"
  ]
}
candidates.notes: Pro baseline round 1 for homepage-wide compare, calibrated v2 prompt
